mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, memory_scope, topic_key, memory_type, content, content_summary, confidence_score, source_type, source_ref_id, is_pinned, is_deleted, last_hit_at, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_memory WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_memory ( user_id, memory_scope, topic_key, memory_type, content, content_summary, confidence_score, source_type, source_ref_id, is_pinned, is_deleted, last_hit_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{memoryScope}, #{topicKey}, #{memoryType}, #{content}, #{contentSummary}, #{confidenceScore}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceRefId}, #{pinned}, #{deleted}, #{lastHitAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_memory SET last_hit_at = #{lastHitAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_memory ( user_id, memory_scope, topic_key, memory_type, content, content_summary, confidence_score, source_type, source_ref_id, is_pinned, is_deleted, last_hit_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, 'TASK', CONCAT('task_', #{taskId}), 'NOTE', #{content}, #{summary}, 0.72, 'task', #{taskId}, 0, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
